prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约12688名（含盘锦校区），2023年约5866名（主校区），2024年约12394名（含盘锦校区），2025年约3867名（物理类，主校区）。2025年因四 川省首次实行新高考物理类选科，招生专业组集中为主校区优势专业，位次大幅前移至约3867名，较往年显著提升；该校在四川省理科/物理类招生计划：2022 年83人、2023年83人、2024年87人、2025年47人（物理类新高考首年，专业组调整），2026年计划58人，较2025年扩招11人（+23.4%），扩招幅度较大，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第28名，近年稳定在28-32名区间，属于全国顶尖理工类高校；2026年声誉 评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第55位，评价为较热，短视频曝光处于中上水平，报考关注度尚可；第五轮学科评估中化学 工程与技术为A+，力学、土木工程、机械工程、工商管理、管理科学与工程、软件工程、生物医学工程为A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A-，共10个A-及以上学科，工科 实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校优势学科高度契合；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万人， 较2025年物理类+历史类合计约46.3万人增加约15.6%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约32.9万人，竞争进一步加剧。；大连理工大学 位于辽宁省，非本省高校，在四川省无特殊地域偏好；该校在全国招生规模较大，四川省招生占比约中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约3867名、2026年招生计划 扩招23.4%（位次数字增大方向）、四川省考生规模扩大约15.6%（竞争加剧）、学校声誉偏负面但影响有限、工科专业热度持续等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后 移。预测最低位次约4450名，区间3950-4950名。

一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班）
- 电子信息类（创新班）
- 人工智能（未来技术班）

- 数学类（华罗庚班）
- 电子信息类
- 智能分子工程（新工科拔尖班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3950-4950名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如3900名以内）可重点冲击一档的人工智能新工科大师班 和电子信息类创新班；位次接近区间上限（如4900名左右）建议以三档专业保底，二档专业稳妥填报。大连理工大学工科实力突出，化学工程与技术A+为全国顶尖，相关专业值得 重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 12688 (including Panjin Campus), in 2023 approximately 5866 (main campus), in 2024 approximately 12394 (including Panjin Campus), and in 2025 approximately 3867 (Physics Category, main campus). In 2025, due to Sichuan Province implementing the new college entrance examination for Physics Category for the first time, the enrollment major groups are concentrated on the main campus's advantageous majors, significantly advancing the ranking to approximately 3867, a notable increase compared to previous years. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan Province for Science/Physics Category: 83 in 2022, 83 in 2023, 87 in 2024, 47 in 2025 (first year of new college entrance examination for Physics Category, major group adjustments), and 58 in 2026, an increase of 11 (+23.4%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 28-32 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving signals of admission cutoffs or abnormal submission lines. Douyin popularity ranking is 55th, evaluated as relatively hot, with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and moderate application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+, Mechanics, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Software Engineering, and Biomedical Engineering are A, Control Science and Engineering and Environmental Science and Engineering are A-, totaling 10 disciplines at A- or above, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to have high social popularity, highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination takers in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to the total of approximately 463,000 for Physics Category + History Category in 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category candidates are about 329,000, further intensifying competition. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, not a local university in Sichuan, with no special regional preference in Sichuan. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale nationwide, with a moderate proportion of enrollment in Sichuan Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 3867, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 23.4% (direction of increasing ranking number), the expansion of Sichuan Province candidate scale by about 15.6% (intensified competition), the somewhat negative but limited impact of school reputation, and the sustained popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4450, with a range of 3950-4950.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 3950-4950, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3900), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Artificial Intelligence New Engineering Master Class and Electronic Information Innovation Class. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 4900), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety and fill in Tier 2 majors steadily. Dalian University of Technology has outstanding engineering strength, with Chemical Engineering and Technology at A+ being top in the country, and related majors deserve special attention.
